# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Start from the base Golang image
FROM golang:alpine

# Add maintainer information
LABEL maintainer="your-email@example.com"

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy go mod and sum files 
COPY go.mod go.sum ./

# Download all dependencies
RUN go mod download

# Copy the source code from the current directory to the Working directory in the container
COPY . .

# Build the Go app
RUN go build -o main .

# Expose port 8080 to the outside world
EXPOSE 8080

# Run the binary program produced by go install
CMD ["/app/main"]
